text: The director shall administer and enforce the provisions of this code relating to the department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 1. The Department of Motor Vehicles [1500 - 1825]
#### Article 2. Powers and Duties [1650 - 1685.1]
##### § 1650

The director shall administer and enforce the provisions of this code relating to the department.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The director shall administer and enforce the provisions of this code relating to the department.
